title: Altitude SMP – Minecraft Server
description: Built, configured, and fully professionalized a Minecraft survival multiplayer server from the ground up. Handled everything from server architecture to community management, creating a polished and scalable gaming platform.
highlights: Set up and optimized Paper/Spigot server for 100+ concurrent players
Configured 30+ plugins for gameplay, economy, and anti-cheat
Managed MySQL database for player stats and economy data
